/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC    -std=c++20 -fPIC -O3 -shared -Wl,-soname,libproblem.so -o ../../lib/libproblem.so CMakeFiles/problem.dir/CutFEM_parameter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/problem.dir/testFunction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/problem.dir/itemVF.cpp.o CMakeFiles/problem.dir/problem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/problem.dir/baseProblem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/problem.dir/levelSet.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/darth/Documents/KTH/Projects/cutfem_2023+/build/lib ../../lib/libFESpace.so ../../lib/libsolver.so ../../lib/libcommon.so
